title_info.content: A store title and description are included with the preview image. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/promoting-marketing/seo/adding-keywords#set-a-title-and-description-for-your-online-store)

main.info: This setting controls the borders style on all the sections throughout the theme.

grid.name: Grid
grid.info: Affects areas with a multicolumn layout.

media.label: Aspect ratio
media.info_cart: Changes the aspect ratio for small product thumbnails used in the cart, search popup and some other areas that require small product thumbnails.

shipping.name: Shipping
shipping.info: This feature only works with a single currency and shipping method. If you're using multiple shipping methods or currencies, it might show false values to the customer.

show.label: Show free shipping minimum amount
show.info: To configure shipping rates, go to your [shipping settings](/admin/settings/shipping).

amount.label: Free shipping minimum amount
amount.info: Write a number, no letters or special characters.

predictive_search.name: Predictive search
predictive_search.info: Predictive search supports suggestions for products, collections, pages and articles.

local-pickup.name: Local availability
local-pickup.info: This theme shows local availability for products.

custom_badges.name: Custom product badges
custom_badges.info: This theme uses custom product badges that you can define here.

select_icon.info: To visualize & download more icons, please visit

social.info: To setup social profiles, go to Theme Settings > Social.
social.label: Show social icons

settings.target: Open link in a new window

map.label: Enable dynamic map
map.info: Make sure that you have the Google Maps API Key properly set in Theme Settings

zoom.label: Map zoom
zoom.info: Choose a proper value to see all the desired stores at once.

image.label: Image
image.info: Upload a static image if you don't want to use the dynamic map.

name.label: Name
name.info: The store name needs to match the name of your store defined in your [location settings](/admin/settings/locations)

closing_times.label: Closing times (optional)
closing_times.info: Add 7 lines, one for each day of the week, starting with Sunday.

timezone.label: Time zone
timezone.info: Used for properly showing closing times

map.name: Map pin
map.info: If the map is enabled, you need to define a custom pin for this address. [Learn how to get your address coordinates](https://support.google.com/maps/answer/18539?hl=en)

map_latitude.label: Latitude
map_latitude.info: Latitude coordinate for the marker. Example: 46.7834818

map_longitude.label: Longitude
map_longitude.info: Longitude coordinate for the marker. Example: 23.5464733

get_directions_button.label: Show "get directions" button
get_directions_button.info: Opens a bigger map in a new browser tab.

layout.label: Header layout
layout.info: Affects the position of the custom blocks & default actions
layout.option__1: Custom blocks on top, default actions on bottom
layout.option__2: Default actions on top, custom blocks on bottom

sticky.label: Sticky header
sticky.info: Shows the navigation when the user scrolls up

style.label: Style
style.info: On buttons only the caption is visible, as the button's label.

link_type.label: Open link
link_type.info: Modal windows only work with interal page links

store-selector.name: Store selector
store-selector.content: The store selector can be configured in the Store Selector section.
store-selector.info: This theme allows you to connect your real store locations to an interactive store selector.

settings.scroll_speed_info: The greater the value, the slower it scrolls

image_size.label: Desktop width
image_size.info: On mobile the image will be fullwidth.

link.info: The title will transform into a link unless there is a label for the button.

video.name: Video
video.label: Video
video.info: The image above will show if this video cannot be played.

settings.excerpt_limit_info: Applies if the article doesn't have a manual excerpt added in the admin.

fullwidth.label: Fullwidth
fullwidth.info: Extend the background of this section to fill the screen.

height.label: Card height
height.info: Minimum height of the card on desktop. On mobile, the height will depend on the content.

crop.label: Fill image area
crop.info: Image will crop to fill the entire height of the card on desktop. On mobile, the image will be always fully shown.

mobile.name: Mobile navigation
mobile.info: These only affect visibility inside the mobile navigation drawer.

header_info_blocks.label_1: Display store selector & info blocks in the header on mobile devices
header_info_blocks.label_2: Position info blocks on top of the first section on the homepage
header_info_blocks.label_2_info: Integrates well when the first section is a fullwidth slideshow

related-products.info: The product recommendations are based on products that are commonly purchased together or products in related collections. If there are no recommendations, the block will not appear.

products.name: Product results
products.info: The content of the product card needs to be set using the section blocks.

pickup_availability.name: Pickup availability
pickup_availability.info: This theme shows pickup availability based on selected store. Learn more

icons.name: Icons list
icons.info: To visualize & download icons included in the theme, please visit.
icons.help: This theme allows you to add custom product icons through dynamic content.

enhance_product_links.label: Enhance product links
enhance_product_links.info: All the links to products will open the product quick buy modal window.

main-article-comments.name: Article comments
main-article-comments.info: To enable comments go to your [blog settings](/admin/blogs).

header.info: Leave empty if you want to load the default previous or next blog post.

payment.name: Payment icons
payment.info: The icons that show are determined by your store's [payment settings](/admin/settings/payments) and the customer's region and currency.

columns.name: Desktop layout
columns.info: The layout adapts itself for mobile devices.

product-quick-view.name: Quick view
product-quick-view.info: This template controls how the product quick view is built. Only this section will appear in the modal window.

text.name: Dynamic text
text.info: Use a dynamic source to highlight a unique attribute by creating a product metafield.

icons.info: Use dynamic sources to highlight unique attributes by creating product metafields for the icon list.

breadcrumbs.label: Improve product breadcrumb navigation
breadcrumbs.info: Adds collection names to the breadcrumb navigation, by duplicating product url's.

seo.name: SEO

seo.info: Specify heading level to help search engines index the structure of your page.

microdata.info: This will remove the schema.org markup from the page. Disable only if you are using a third party app for SEO!

hotspot.mobile_info: Only if a mobile image is set

hotspot.label: Hotspot
hotspot.mobile_info: Only if a mobile image is set

auto_height.label: Auto height
auto_height.info_slider: Checking this option will overwrite the height settings above and make the slideshow's height responsive to the image inside each slide.

show_block.low: Display only when inventory falls below threshold

breadcrumb.name: Breadcrumb
breadcrumb.info: The breadcrumb navigation doesn't appear on the homepage

cart_upsell.name: Individual product recommendation
cart_upsell.info: Dynamic recommendations are based on the items in your cart. They change and improve with time. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/storefront-search/search-and-discovery-recommendations)

gift_wrapping.name: Gift wrapping
gift_wrapping.info: Gift wrapping needs to be set up as a product.

gallery_resize.label: Images aspect ratio
gallery_resize.info: Videos and other types of media will be displayed in their original aspect ratio.

gallery_background.label: Gallery background
gallery_background.info: Only visible if the images are set to fit inside the container.

padding.label: Container inner spacing
padding.info: Only works if the media is set to fit inside the container.

background.label: Container background
background.info: Only visible if the media are set to fit inside the container.

thumbnails.color_swatches: Show color swatches in product card
thumbnails.color_swatches_on_hover: Show color swatches in product card (on hover)

color_swatches_label.label: Color swatches labels
color_swatches_label.info: Write multiple option names (separated by commas) that you want to become color swatches.

custom_badges.info: This theme uses custom product badges that you can define here.

hr.label: Show horizontal rules
hr.info: Displays a small visual horizontal rule on some titles

preloader.label: Media preloader
preloader.info: Shows a small circular preloader while media on your store are still loading.

breadcrumb.label: Show breadcrumb
breadcrumb.info: Breadcrumb navigation helps users to navigate through the store and shows up only on collection, product, search & account pages.

animation_style.label: Caption display (desktop)
animation_style.info: On mobile, the caption will always be visible for better UX

quick_buy.name: Quick buy
quick_buy.info: Adds an instant "add to cart" button. If the product has variants, it will display a "quick buy" popup.
quick_buy.label: Enable quick buy

collections_menu.info: This has a bold design, especially in the classic menu style, where it transforms into a mega menu with the possibility of adding images and a promotion.

show_images.label: Show collection images
show_images.info: Only applies if the parent items is a collection.

show.label: Show promotion block
show.info: In minimal style it shows at the bottom of the menu drawer. In classic style it shows in the collections menu, if present.

header.label: Product header
header.info: On mobile devices the product header will always appear at the top, above the product gallery.

gallery_aspect.label: Scale slider images to fit the viewport
gallery_aspect.info: On mobile, images will always fit the device's viewport.

color_swatches.label: Show color swatches
color_swatches.info: This theme can show custom images for color swatches.

icons.label: Icons
icons.info: To visualize all the icons included in the theme, please visit

aspect_ratio.label: Images aspect ratio
aspect_ratio.info: When using the natural aspect ratio, make sure that you resize your thumbnails at the same size, for a clean grid design. Using one of the cropped setting, all thumbnails will be resized to the same dimension.

style_mobile.label: Turn gallery into a slider on mobile

mobile_design.label: Turn the vertical slider into a horizontal one on mobile

link.label: Link
link.info: Unless there is a label for the button, the link will be on the text.

image.label: Fallback image
image.info: A fallback image will be used on mobile devices where autoplay might be disabled.

header__1.info: Dynamic recommendations use order and product information to change and improve over time. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/storefront-search/search-and-discovery-recommendations)

open_first.label: Have the first toggle opened by default

settings.enable_scroll_based_trigger_info: Only show the popup if the page is scrolled at a particular position.

image.label: Image
image.info: 1240 x 400px .jpg recommended. It only appears on desktop

cookies.cookies_info: The cookies popover will only be visible if it customer data is set to be collected after consent.

quick_buy.name: Quick buy popup
quick_buy.info: This theme can show a quick buy popup when a user clicks on the Add to cart button.

media.label: Aspect ratio
media.info_cart: Changes the aspect ratio for small product thumbnails used in the cart and other sections.
media.info_search: Changes the aspect ratio for small product thumbnails used in the predictive search sidebar.

cover.content: Use a dynamic source to display a different image on each page.

gallery.layout_info: Defaults to a 1 column slider on mobile devices

reviews.info: This setting is only available for the Shopify Reviews App (Deprecated).

icons.settings_info: Use dynamic sources to highlight unique attributes by creating product metafields for the icon list.
icons.page_info: Use dynamic sources to highlight unique attributes by creating product metafields for the icon list.

show_block.low: Display only when inventory falls below threshold

blending_modes.label: Text blending mode
blending_modes.info: Exclusion mode works when the text color is the same or similar with the background color.
blending_modes.button_info: Solid style doesn't work with blending modes.

link.info: The title will transform into a link unless there is a label for the button.

layout.offset_info: On desktop, the maximum offset will be limited so that images don't go off the screen.
layout.scroll_info: Adjusting the scroll speed will make the element move slower of faster, thus creating a parallax effect. Only available on desktop.

icon.name: Icon
icon.info: To visualize & download icons, please visit our

color.info: Controls the design of the call to action button on mobile devices.

description.info: Truncates the description to the specified number of words.

content.info: Choosing specific products will override the collection selection.
content.products_requirements: Make sure that the selected products have at least a variant in stock.
content.limit_bundles: Allow each product to be added only once to the bundle

discount.discount_items: Minimum items required to get a discount
discount.info: To create discounts, go to your [discounts settings](/admin/discounts).
discount.mobile: Have discount panel opened by default on mobile.

color_swatches.label: Show color swatches
color_swatches.info: This theme shows color swatches for color variants.

color_swatches_label.label: Color swatches labels
color_swatches_label.info: Write multiple variant titles (separated by commas) that you want to become color swatches.

variant_images.label: Change product image based on selected variant
variant_images.info: Displays the selected variant's image instead of the product's featured image.

variant_default.label: Select the first available variant by default
variant_default.info: If unchecked, the user will have to select an available variant before being able to purchase.

show_price.label: Show price inside "add to cart" button

show_only_available.label: Don't show quick buy if product is out of stock

header.info: This theme allows more types of header blocks.

logo.mobile_image_info: Upload a smaller version of your logo if needed. Maximum height 40px.

menu_style.label: Desktop menu style (one row)
menu_style.info: On mobile devices or when the classic menu is too wide to fit the screen's size, the menu will automatically switch to the drawer style.

homepage_enable.label: Enable on homepage
homepage_enable.info: Make sure that the first section on your homepage is either an image slider or a fullwidth image.

collection_enable.label: Enable on collection pages
collection_enable.info: Make sure that collection banner images are enabled and your collections have featured images.

custom_enable.label: Enable on custom pages
custom_enable.info: Write custom page handles, separated by commas.

logo.info: Upload same size as the original logo.

autoplay.label: Autoplay
autoplay.info: Autoplay pauses when the user hovers the mouse over the tab.

new-account-component.label_style_info: The account icon doesn't show labels.

updated-sale-badge-info: Products with varying prices across variants will show a generic 'Sale' badge.

product-card-video.info: Displays the first self hosted video from the product gallery, instead of the featured image.

new-account-component.title: Customer accounts
new-account-component.info: Only works with the new customer account component. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/customers/customer-accounts/account-component)

video-compression.compress_videos_with_m3u8_info: Use Shopify's video compression for better performance. Might affect the quality, especially for short videos.

show_discount_code.label: Enable cart discounts
show_discount_code.collapsible: Make notes & discount fields collapsible inside cart drawer

back-in-stock-alert.content: Store owner will receive an email when a customer fills in this form. Store owner must manually notify the customer once the product is back in stock.
back-in-stock-alert.info: This back in stock alert form will show up when the product is out of stock.

settings.info: Use [br] to insert a line break.
If entire card has a link, the inner links will not work

height.info: Cards will automatically expand if content requires more space.

cart-tos-update.cart_terms_checkbox: Enable terms and conditions requirement for checkout

product-siblings.name: Product siblings
product-siblings.info: To assign a different list to each product, use a product reference list metafield as a dynamic source.

labels.default_image_info: Used when the product has no images.
labels.hide_at_checkout_info: If checked, the line item property will not be shown in the order summary.
labels.required_info: Customers must fill out this field to add the product to the cart.
labels.custom_property_info: Line item properties allow you to gather customization details for a product added to the cart.
labels.show_custom_link_info: Uses native sharing options based on browser support.
labels.crop_videos_when_following_images_aspect: Fill videos to match the aspect ratio of the images
labels.enable_add_to_cart_for_multiple_variants: Enable add to cart for multiple variants
When enabled, the 'Add to cart' button will add the first available or selected variant directly to the cart. If disabled, it will display a 'Choose options' button instead.

autoplay.label: Enable video autoplay
autoplay.info: The video will be muted and without controls.

video_upload.label: Video file
video_upload.info: Hosted by Shopify. Replaces video URL.

poster.info: Used as a poster or a fallback image.

variant_metafields.name: Variant metafield
variant_metafields.label: Variant metafield key
variant_metafields.info: This theme can show a variant metafield on the product page.

new_color_swatches: This theme also offers support for color swatches created with category metafields. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields/category-metafields/using-category-metafields).
sticky_cart_actions: Stick action buttons at the bottom of the cart drawer

divider.label: Divider
divider.divider_image_info: A horizontally repeating image. Replaces the previous style and color.

performance.name: Performance
performance.label: Preload links on hover
performance.info: Increases the perceived loading speed of pages.

recently_viewed.enable_recently_viewed_products_info: When enabled, the theme will record viewed products, but you need to add the section in your store in order to show these products.
recently_viewed.recently_viewed_products_info: This section needs to have the functionality enabled in Theme Settings. It will show up only after users visit at least a product page.

rating_apps_update.label: Rating app
rating_apps_update.info: Third party apps may require additional steps to be properly integrated.

color-schemes.default_info: Used to set colors for account pages, 404 pages, and other pages or sections without color scheme settings.

custom-social-icons.info: Upload a custom icon for your favorite social network

dynamic_content.name: Dynamic content
dynamic_content.hide_block: Hide block if dynamic content is not present
dynamic_content.hide_section: Hide section if dynamic content is not present

labels.slider_layout_info: The slider layout disables the thumbnail gallery, if enabled.

settings.modal_info: Modal options can be configured in the Quick Buy product page template.

bundle-240.product_gallery_mobile_padding: Add padding to the gallery on mobile

footer-menu-items.open_links_in_new_window: Open links in a new window
